name: full-functional-audit
assertions: A1: Source-based scanning of routes/components (Web: routing table + component list)
A2: API discovery via OpenAPI spec parsing or endpoint enumeration
A3: Journey grouping (auth, onboarding, core workflow, settings, admin)
A4: Target-feature sizing heuristic (~20 features representing all journey phases)

pass_detail.A1: pass — explicit `find app pages src/pages src/app -name 'page.*'` for Next.js and `grep -rnE '.(get|post|put|delete)('` for Express/Fastify
pass_detail.A2: pass — `jq -r '.paths | keys[]' openapi.json` and `yq '.paths | keys' openapi.yaml`

with_skill.key_miss: none — all 4 assertions directly addressed in new Phase 2 Feature Inventory Techniques section

notes: New Phase 2 section (lines 40-88) adds 6-stack source-based discovery (Next.js, Flask/Django, Express, OpenAPI, iOS, CLI), journey grouping with 5 worked examples, and 5–15 journey sizing heuristic. Lifts pass-rate from 0.50 to 1.0 — exceeds the ≥0.75 target.
